working_on: Phase 1.5.5 mechanical sweep — apply the inward-document expression contract (ADR 0036) across the seven offender files: docs/business.md, docs/architecture.md, docs/MISSION.md, docs/content-strategy.md, AGENT_INSTRUCTIONS.md (boundary cases), docs/tensions.md (open entries only), adr/README.md (orientation prose).
outcome_summary: Phase 1.5.5 mechanical-sweep cleanup pass applied. Voice-only edits across the seven offender files. docs/MISSION.md opening blockquote rewritten to the contract worked-example form; subheading session-attribution marker dropped; audience-paragraph supersession narration trimmed. docs/business.md heaviest offender (34 tokens at audit) cleaned: section header date markers dropped; per-commitment ADR supersession parentheticals consolidated to See also block; explicit Original framing / Current framing bullet pair on cost-ceiling collapsed to present-state assertion; 1,200-character footer-metadata block dropped. docs/architecture.md 14 in-section Added/Revised markers stripped; Individual Data Regime supersession narration rewritten with end-of-section See also block; trailing footer dropped. docs/content-strategy.md 7 section header date markers dropped; trailing footer dropped. AGENT_INSTRUCTIONS.md opening blockquote second paragraph and trailing footer rewritten as present-tense See also block (forbidden-token enumeration body unchanged — the contract's load-bearing surface). docs/tensions.md open entries only (resolved entries exempt by contract): Mastery State Terminology trailing supersession-narration parenthetical replaced; OQ-WALL-BEHAVIOR title-line revision-narration token dropped, body's S-0012 simplification paragraph rewritten as present-state, cross-domain-bridge-cap-from-prior-version sentence dropped; trailing five-paragraph footer-metadata block dropped. adr/README.md orientation prose two paragraphs replaced with single present-state summary; per-phase ADR tables preserved unchanged. tools/validate.py: 0 hard-fails, 0 soft-warns. STATE.md updated with S-0019 next-session work item (ROADMAP.md substantive cleanup, judgment-heavy per the three-speech-acts handling); CHANGELOG entry under [Unreleased] names every cleaned file with the specific revision-narration tokens dropped or rewritten. Phase 1.5.5 closes after S-0019; Phase 2 (Build Plan Scaffolding) opens at S-0020.
